type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: All sources on site, including blasting and exposed mine areas, were captured in the calculations.  The numbers used for calculations, particularly for blasting, are very conservative. More refined methodologies were used for this year's reporting.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There is no option to report disposal of this compound in tailings and waste rock, as per the 2022 NPRI Guide.  As such, the mass of this substance from tailings that was disposed on-site are included in the disposal off-site category.
